{{Infobox religious building
| name = Fuseno Shrine (Q135039917)
| native_name = 布制神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Fuseno Shrine'''|布制神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11386164|ltq=Q11386164|qid=Q11386164|1=List of Shikinaisha in Shinano Province}}
** Series ordinal: 9
** P155: {{ill|Q85879982|ltq=Q85879982|qid=Q85879982|1=Kawaai Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Haheshinano Shrine|lt=Haheshinano Shrine|qid=Q135039918|1=Haheshinano Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q289250|ltq=Q289250|qid=Q289250|1=Shinano Province}}
* {{ill|Q7423207|ltq=Q7423207|qid=Q7423207|1=Sarashina District, Nagano}}
